name: odoo-mcp
description: Talk to any Odoo 16+ database with zero Odoo-side setup. Requires uv (https://docs.astral.sh/uv/).
long_description: Odoo MCP turns any Odoo 16+ database into a Model Context Protocol server using only your existing credentials — no App Store module, no admin access. 39 tools: bounded reads, server-side aggregation, schema discovery, diagnostics, migration helpers, local BM25 knowledge search, accounting reports, and a gated write workflow with approval tokens and an audit trail. Speaks XML-RPC for Odoo 16-18 and External JSON-2 for Odoo 19+.

odoo_url.title: Odoo URL
odoo_url.description: Full URL of your Odoo server, e.g. https://mycompany.odoo.com

odoo_db.title: Database name
odoo_db.description: The Odoo database to connect to

odoo_username.title: Username
odoo_username.description: Your Odoo login (usually an email address)

odoo_password.title: API key or password
odoo_password.description: An Odoo API key (Settings → My Profile → Account Security) is safer than a password
